Prompt: Write a short, engaging overview about . Keep it fact-based and focus on verifiable information, but feel free to use a relaxed and conversational tone. Present the most significant and relevant points first. Include information about . Ignore . Surround all names of people with and all location names with . No need for headers and titles. When you refer to the place, no need to mention the state and country.
PromptSuffix: If relevant, note key differences between <place> and <previous_place>. Avoid repeating information already mentioned: <previous_answer>.
SharingPromptTemplate: Create a brief, factual description (2-3 sentences) of this road trip route. Include the starting and ending locations, key stops along the way, and relevant geographical or logistical details. Keep it informative and straightforward. Route details: {ROUTE_DETAILS} Example style: "This route travels from [first place] to [last place], covering [distance/region]. The journey includes stops at [key locations] and passes through [geographical features or notable areas]. Total travel spans [time period/distance] across [type of terrain/region]."
